verdictSummary: Zero PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE claims emitted; all USCE-flavored signals were correctly held at HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED or downgraded to FUTURE_LANE_ONLY (GME/Administrative Fellowship/Careers/Volunteer). No scope conflicts or overclaims survived. Tier 2/3 coverage is strong; Tier 1 is PASS_PARTIAL — the /medical-professionals For Students nav exposes 'Observer Programs' and UME 'medical school rotations' references that were not followed to a detail page. Two narrow A4 recovery tasks recommended. Several duplicate claims across mirrored hostname pairs (nicklauschildrens.org vs www.nicklauschildrens.org) flagged for downstream dedupe.
